issues.description: Condition checks for specific card 'X.Drake' but effect requires Leader to have {Supernovas} type. Should use LeaderHasType condition, not HasCardOnBoard.

Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Effect text 'set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active' describes activating existing DON cards, not giving new ones. Should use 'AttachDon' with appropriate scope for resting/activating DON cards, or clarify intent.
Effect states 'at the end of this turn' which indicates a delayed/conditional action. Duration should reflect end-of-turn timing, not immediate application.
Target should specify 'maxCost':5 is present but should clarify this filters opponent's Characters appropriately.
